item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p06","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant directly refuses the requested fridge-side confirmer in the first sentence, names the repeated pattern of downstream manual gates across the earlier reagent, instrument, and waste-liquid incidents, and shifts attention upstream to capacity, registration, ownership, and exception-handling failures. It proposes cross-process source-control review and replacing the manual patch pattern rather than adding another checkpoint."}
